SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-09-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-09-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GERMOND, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOFFMAN, JOHN $2,118.04 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,223.04, DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $439.00 AN AMOUNT THE DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
